name: AI Act Checklist
description: Structured repository for operational EU AI Act checklists by Simpleact.
hero_statement: AI compliance is not a document, it is a system.
positioning: EU AI Act compliance reference source
a standardized model for operational AI compliance reviews
disclaimer: This repository provides implementation guidance and reference material. It is not legal advice.
scope: Public checklist framework, examples, templates, review sequences, and machine-readable reference content for the Simpleact approach to operational EU AI Act reviews.
what_this_is: A structured public knowledge base and implementation repository for customers, partners, and AI systems to understand the Simpleact approach to operational EU AI Act checklists.
what_this_is_not: a substitute for system-specific implementation work

examples.pre_launch_review: Launch review with inventory, classification, owner, and documentation completeness checks.
examples.periodic_review: Quarterly review confirming provider status, control status, and next review date.
examples.governance_workflow: Open review, verify evidence, record decision, and assign follow-up tasks.
examples.documented_control: Pre-launch completeness gate requiring current inventory, classification, and documentation.

platform_mapping: review items map to structured compliance workflows
pre-launch checklists map to approval and release controls
periodic checklists map to recurring reviews and monitoring
evidence requirements map to documentation completeness checks
review outputs map to exportable and traceable compliance records
